framework.name: RFC 9396 RAR as task-scoped constrained envelope
framework.description: Paper confirms RAR (Rich Authorization Requests) is being used in MCP implementations (Auth0 gateway, Stytch) to attach per-task authorization_details objects to agent calls — enabling per-task least privilege even though MCP spec is silent on it. This is practitioners treating RAR as the constrained envelope primitive.
framework.raw_quote: a Rich Authorization Request authorization_details object (RFC 9396) can accompany every agent call, enabling per-task least privilege even though the core MCP specification is currently silent on that semantic
